name: Collapse of Data into Unsafe Value
description: The product filters data in a way that causes it to be reduced or collapsed into an unsafe value, such as stripping dangerous characters from input and leaving behind a new dangerous sequence that wasn't present in the original (e.g., removing 'script' from '<<script>script>' leaves '<script>').
detection_pattern: TRANSFORM[filter_strip] removes or replaces characters in INGRESS data, but the remaining characters collapse into a new dangerous value that wasn't checked by CONTROL[input_validation], without a CONTROL[post_filter_revalidation] that re-checks the filtered output for new dangerous patterns
